reviews.comment:
Una parada de siempre para cargar combustible, estirar las piernas u comer algo antes de llegar, bueno el restaurant y la atención magnífica

(Translated by Google)
A regular stop to refuel, stretch your legs, or grab a bite before arriving; the restaurant and service were excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZMTkySHRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Quisimos comer parrilla,  parece que fuera de temporada no funciona,  había hamburguesas,  muy caras,  secas y la lamina de queso,  transparente,  sin lechuga ni nada,  prefiero un rico choripan en cualquier comercio de la ruta

(Translated by Google)
We wanted to eat grilled meat, but it seems it doesn't work out of season. They had hamburgers, very expensive, dry, and the cheese slice was transparent, with no lettuce or anything. I prefer a good choripan from any roadside stand.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZcF9lQUh3EAE

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:

Very complete, ideal for resting for a while and continuing your journey.

reviews.comment:
Vale la pena desviarse para estar en el ACA Dolores tienen mesa y bancos para disfrutar de un gran parque

(Translated by Google)
It's worth the detour to visit the ACA Dolores; they have tables and benches to enjoy a great park.
